name: Donald Trump
title: President of the United States
bio: 45th and 47th President of the United States. Previously ordered the strike that killed IRGC commander Qasem Soleimani in January 2020.

name: Pete Hegseth
title: Secretary of Defense
bio: US Secretary of Defense. Oversees military posture in the Middle East including CENTCOM operations.

name: Marco Rubio
title: Secretary of State
bio: US Secretary of State. Leads diplomatic efforts and sanctions coordination on Iran.

name: Gen. Michael Kurilla
title: CENTCOM Commander
bio: Commander of US Central Command, overseeing all military operations in the Middle East region.

name: Gen. CQ Brown
title: Chairman, Joint Chiefs of Staff
bio: Senior military advisor to the President and Secretary of Defense.

name: Ali Khamenei
title: Supreme Leader of Iran
bio: Iran's Supreme Leader since 1989, holds ultimate authority over military and foreign policy.

name: Masoud Pezeshkian
title: President of Iran
bio: Iranian President elected in 2024, considered a relative moderate within the system.

name: Maj. Gen. Hossein Salami
title: IRGC Commander-in-Chief
bio: Commander of the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps since 2019.

name: Abbas Araghchi
title: Foreign Minister of Iran
bio: Iranian Foreign Minister, former nuclear negotiator, leads diplomatic outreach.

name: Adm. Ali Reza Tangsiri
title: IRGC Navy Commander
bio: Commander of the IRGC Navy, responsible for Persian Gulf and Strait of Hormuz operations.
